rulings.Case Title: SONIA ZEPEDA et al VS. WELLS FARGO BANK, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION FOR ITSELF et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, February 14, 2013, line 1. DEFENDANTS WELLS FARGO BANK, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION, AS TRUSTEE FOR THE CERTIFICATE HOLDERS OF STRUCTURED ASSET MORTGAGE INVESTMENTS II, INC., BEAR STEARNS MORTGAGE FUNDING TRUST 2006-AR1, MORTGAGE PASSTHROUGH CERTIFICATE SERIES 2006-AR1'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT Continued to March 13, 2013 moving party to comply with submitting courtesy copy of Request for Judicial Notice filed on September 24, 2012. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: WALLACE C DOOLITTLE et al VS. BRAD D SANDERS et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, February 14, 2013, line 2. DEFENDANT BRAD SANDERS' Motion To Expunge DENY - Real Party claim and plaintiff sustained burden. Also stay denied. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: WALLACE C DOOLITTLE et al VS. BRAD D SANDERS et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, February 14, 2013, line 2. DEFENDANT BRAD SANDERS' DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT OVERRULED - 10 days to answer this complaint is not the same cause of action as on appeal and in arbitration. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JULIE TISHKOFF VS. JEFFREY LAUGHLIN et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, February 14, 2013, line 3. DEFENDANT JEFFREY LAUGHLIN'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED - 10 days to answer; fifth cause of action sufficiently sets forth that habitability issues were never addressed. See paragraph 13 and 51. = (501/REQ)
